title: rubus cochlearis
intro: Rubus cochlearis, also known as the Raspberry Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus cochlearis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues. Rubus cochlearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
